workload.note: Lesson payload, available pools and Today governor served workload are separate. Today review serves a bounded default slice, full manual catch-up stays capped separately, axis review cards are staged into the due deck, due 25-44 recommends review without blocking a lesson, and due >= 45 creates a consolidation/recovery day.

fluencyReads.title: First smooth read
fluencyReads.check: Which word in the read has a Thai tone mark?

fluencyReads.title: Price fragment
fluencyReads.check: Which word has the final -t ending job?

fluencyReads.title: Live/dead read
fluencyReads.check: Which word is a dead syllable with a final -t sound?

fluencyReads.title: Silent-leader read
fluencyReads.check: Which word uses silent ห to lead a low-class consonant?

fluencyReads.title: Public sign read
fluencyReads.check: Which sign word is built from ทาง + ออก?

fluencyReads.title: Bangkok end read
fluencyReads.check: Which word has the เ◌ิ pattern?

phase1Completion.pass: 85% quiz plus smooth or slow-but-correct final controlled read

prompts.text: Which class?
Pick the mid class consonant
What consonant sound?
Which class?
Which class?
Listen: which Thai did you hear?
Mini decode: how does this read?
Listen: which Thai did you hear?
Mid class กา has no tone mark. What tone do we read here?
Hear it. Which consonant is it?

payoff.context: A small real verb: you can read มา before you know much Thai grammar.
payoff.capability: You read มา from Thai script.
